title: XIFT v1.0 KnowledgeObject Envelope
description: The canonical XIFT envelope (KnowledgeObject; predecessor: MemoryObject). Flat JSON canonicalized per RFC 8785 (JCS) and signed with Ed25519. Mandatory blocks (Identity, Operational, Content, Security) are top-level fields; each declared extension is a top-level object keyed by the extension name. Source: xift-1.0-spec-core.md §3.3 (mandatory blocks), §3.4 (minimal example), §4/§8 (extensions, identity). Wire field names are frozen for protocol stability.

envelope_id.description: Identity block. Unique identifier for this envelope (core §3.3.1).

protocol_version.description: Identity block. XIFT version; v1 is "1.0" (core §3.3.1).

extensions.description: Identity block. Names of the opt-in extensions populated on this envelope (core §3.3.1, §4). MUST be consistent with the extension objects present; consistency is enforced at the protocol layer, not by this schema.

recipient_did.description: Identity block. Authorized recipient agent's DID (core §3.3.1, §8.2).

correlation_id.description: Identity block. OPTIONAL. envelope_id of the envelope this responds to (core §3.3.1).

created_at.description: Identity block. UTC timestamp, millisecond precision (core §3.3.1).

status.description: Operational block. Operational status of the artifact (core §3.3.2).

next_action.description: Operational block. Non-binding processing hint for the receiver (core §3.3.2).

memory_scope.description: Operational block. CoALA stratum the knowledge targets (core §3.3.2). Frozen wire name.

task_id.description: Operational block. OPTIONAL. Receiver-domain task correlation (core §3.3.2).

session_id.description: Operational block. OPTIONAL. Durable conversation identifier (core §3.3.2).

payload_inline.description: Content block. Base64-encoded payload, at most payload_inline_size_max (core §10). Frozen wire name. Mutually exclusive with content_ref (see oneOf).

content_ref.description: Content block. Locator for out-of-band payload retrieval (core §3.3.3). Frozen wire name. Mutually exclusive with payload_inline (see oneOf).

payload_hash.description: Content block. SHA-256 of the canonical payload. REQUIRED with content_ref, OPTIONAL with payload_inline (core §3.3.3). Frozen wire name.

content_type.description: Content block. MIME or domain-specific payload type (core §3.3.3). Frozen wire name.

signing_key_id.description: Security block. DID URL fragment identifying the signing key (core §3.3.4).

canonical_signature.description: Security block. Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over JCS(envelope minus this field) (core §3.3.4, §8.3). NOT the prefixed-hex hash form.

governance.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "governance" is listed in extensions.

provenance.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "provenance" is listed in extensions.

encryption.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "encryption" is listed in extensions.

revocation.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "revocation" is listed in extensions. Requires governance (core §3.3.5 combination rule).

quality.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "quality" is listed in extensions. Silently ignorable.

ontology.description: Opt-in extension block. Present iff "ontology" is listed in extensions. Silently ignorable.

revocation.x-xift-note: core §3.3.5 / extension-revocation: the revocation extension requires governance to be present.

sha256_hash.description: Prefixed lowercase-hex digest (core §3.3.3 canonical hash-string format).
